75985.subject: The worldвАЩs most liveable cities in 2026
75985.body:
The EconomistвАЩs week ahead

–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: The Economist


–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: The Economist

    
    
    –Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞–є—В–µ —Ж—О —Б—В–∞—В—В—О –љ–∞ LinkedIn, —Й–Њ–± –њ—А–Є—Ф–і–љ–∞—В–Є—Б—П –і–Њ –Њ–±–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А–µ–љ–љ—П
–Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞—В–Є –љ–∞ LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/worlds-most-liveable-cities-2026-the-economist-ptmke?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BpS5DkCLNRGm8scE0OfWiIQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=28cq89BSBSKsk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrm0wxjq~pz-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrm0wxjq-pz
  
Sign up for free here to receive this newsletter in your inbox every Saturday. YouвАЩll also get our weekly newsletter with an exclusive introduction from our editor-in-chief. A year ago in this newsletter I wrote, вАЬIt will be a relief if the [liveable-cities] index in 2026 shows that the world remains as liveable as it is now.вАЭ In a way I got my wish: the latest global average liveability score held steady at 76.1 out of 100, the same as in 2025. But drill down into the regions and it looks less stable. Cities across the Middle East, from Doha to Dubai, dropped down the ranking after they were caught up in the Iran war. Muscat, OmanвАЩs capital, performed the worst, plummeting 14 places. And war-torn Tehran joined war-torn Damascus in the bottom ten. Health-care improvements in every Chinese city in the index helped balance out these plunging scores. As much as IвАЩd love to predict an improvement in liveability over the coming year, given the volatility in the Middle East IвАЩd settle for an uneventful year of stolidity. Alex Selby-Boothroyd, Head of data journalism EditorвАЩs picks The worldвАЩs most, and least, liveable cities in 2026 See how 173 cities compare in EIUвАЩs annual ranking Where expat escapees from Dubai end up Will they ever return? Global democracy is in better shape than you think EIUвАЩs annual index suggests an end to the democracy recession AfricaвАЩs new middle class is putting down roots in the suburbs For a glimpse of the continentвАЩs future, visit the edges of its burgeoning cities Why GermanyвАЩs cities are going broke Bad news for residents, good news for the far rightвАЩs electoral chances Go beyond the headlines Get unlimited digital access to The Economist by subscribing today.
–Я—А–Є—Ф–і–љ–∞—В–Є—Б—П –і–Њ –Њ–±–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А–µ–љ–љ—П
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/worlds-most-liveable-cities-2026-the-economist-ptmke?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BpS5DkCLNRGm8scE0OfWiIQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=28cq89BSBSKsk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mrm0wxjq~pz-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrm0wxjq-pz

Fear and Greed is at
34
(Fear)
and BTC is at
$65K
this morning. Yesterday's CPI print came in well below
expectations, sending BTC above $64K within minutes and snapping
eight straight weeks of ETF outflows.

The macro mood has shifted fast. Lower inflation reduces the
case for further rate hikes, softens the dollar, and improves the
conditions for ETF inflows to return. The regulatory pipeline is
also moving, with major stablecoin decisions coming from both
sides of the Atlantic.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

JPMorgan Just Cut Estimates for Circle and Coinbase

JPMorgan lowered earnings forecasts for Circle and Coinbase on
July 14 after a restructured revenue deal with Hyperliquid
significantly reduced Circle's share of USDC reserve income.

The bank described the arrangement as a prisoner's dilemma,
pushing the two partners to compete against each other on future
distribution deals. USDC's circulating supply has contracted by
roughly $7 billion since March.

How does Hyperliquid's new revenue structure affect Circle's
stablecoin income?
